ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-13-2023 Continued To Nov-22-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
The following matters were heard: PES-18-302143 The Estate of Kuei-Shi Lei and PES-21-304152 The estate of Yu-Tien Lei.

Appearances: Alina Laguna appeared via zoom for and with Shancha Lei (administrator).

Discussion was held in regard to the 50% of interest in real property that is being held in the name of Kuei-Shi Lei, that it should be passed to her husband Shancha Lei the surviving spouse. Spousal property petition is taken under submission with the intent to grant. Petition for an order to confirm validity of trust is taken under submission. Status on close of estate is continued to November 22, 2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Ross Moody. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Saephan. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Continued To Feb-27-23 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alina G. Luna, via Zoom, for and with Shancha Lei, Personal Representative.

At the query of the court, counsel reports that she did not appear at the last calling because she'd filed an 850 petition and was provided a Jan-03-2023 hearing date which has been tentatively continued by the court to Feb-27-2023 so that she may prepare and file an accounting. The court and counsel discuss her plans with this matter and the 850 petition.

After additional discussion, the Order to Appear is taken off calendar. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Feb-27-2023 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Choi. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Dec-19-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Nov-21-2022 Continued To Dec-19-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Administrator Shangcha Lei and Attorney Alina Laguna to appear on Dec-19-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-26-2022 Continued To Nov-21-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Aug-22-2022 Continued To Sep-26-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jul-18-2022 Continued To Aug-22-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Alina Laguna, via Zoom, for and with Shancha Lei, Administrator.

Counsel reports on the issues she had with the mail sent to her previous address and confirms her new address and that she has filed a formal change of address with the court. Counsel then offers an update as to the status of this matter and advises that she is considering filing a Heggstad Petition and is also considering other options.

After additional discussion, the Order to Appear is taken off calendar. The Status on Close of Estate is continued to Aug-22-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Glisson. Not Reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Jul-18-2022 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Jun-20-2022 Continued To Jul-18-22 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person. An Order to Appear will be issued to Personal Representative Shancha Lei and Attorney Alina Laguna to appear on Jul-18-2022 at 9:00 am in Dept. 204 to explain why they failed to appear and why the inventory and appraisal, and a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration have not been filed. The status hearing is also continued to that date.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Singh. Not Reported.
